title: Free Press, Mistrusted Press
alt_text: Data visualization: press freedom scores vs media trust levels by country
slides:
Finland ranks 1st in press freedom. 69% of Finns trust the media.

The US ranks 55th. 32% of Americans do.

Those two things are not the same problem.

32% media trust in the US is lower than Kenya (61%), Brazil (54%), Indonesia (59%).

Countries with less press freedom. More trust.

Freedom of the press and belief in the press are different variables.

~1,800 local newspapers closed in the US since 2004. National partisan media filled the gap.

41% of Americans now actively avoid news — the highest rate in the Reuters survey.

A free press nobody reads.
sources: RSF Press Freedom Index 2024 · Reuters Institute Digital News Report 2024
